mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExampprDAO.tkexamExampprAnswShtList 설 명 : 시험응시시험지답안목록조회 */ SELECT EXAMPPR.EXAMPPR_ID , EXAMPPR.QSTN_DSPLY_SEQNO , EXAMPPR.QSTN_VWITM_DSPLY_SEQ , QSTN.QSTN_ID , QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID , QSTN.QSTN_TTL , QSTN.QSTN_SCR , DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(QSTN_CTS, 4000, 1) AS QSTN_CTS , QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD , QSTN.CRANS_TYCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'QSTN_DFCTLV_TYCD' AND CD = QSTN.QSTN_DFCTLV_TYCD) AS QSTN_DFCTLV_TYNM , NVL(ANSW_SHT.SCR,0) AS SCR , ANSW_SHT.TKEXAM_ANSW_SHT_ID , ANSW_SHT.ANSW_SHT_CTS , (SELECT LISTAGG(QSTN_VWITM_CTS, '@#') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY INSTR('@#' || EXAMPPR.QSTN_VWITM_DSPLY_SEQ || '@#', '@#' || QSTN_VWITM_SEQNO || '@#')) FROM TB_LMS_QSTN_VWITM WHERE QSTN_ID = QSTN.QSTN_ID) AS QSTN_VWITM_CTS , (SELECT LISTAGG(QSTN_VWITM_CTS, '@#') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY QSTN_VWITM_SEQNO) FROM TB_LMS_QSTN_VWITM WHERE QSTN_ID = QSTN.QSTN_ID AND CRANS_YN = 'Y') AS CRANS_CTS , (SELECT LISTAGG(QSTN_VWITM_SEQNO, '@#') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY QSTN_VWITM_SEQNO) FROM TB_LMS_QSTN_VWITM WHERE QSTN_ID = QSTN.QSTN_ID AND CRANS_YN = 'Y') AS CRANS_NO FROM TB_LMS_EXAMPPR EXAMPPR JOIN TB_LMS_QSTN QSTN ON EXAMPPR.QSTN_ID = QSTN.QSTN_ID AND QSTN.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_ANSW_SHT ANSW_SHT ON EXAMPPR.EXAMPPR_ID = ANSW_SHT.EXAMPPR_ID AND EXAMPPR.USER_ID = ANSW_SHT.USER_ID AND EXAMPPR.QSTN_ID = ANSW_SHT.QSTN_ID WHERE EXAMPPR.TKEXAM_ID = #{tkexamId} AND EXAMPPR.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY EXAMPPR.QSTN_DSPLY_SEQNO
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : ExampprDAO.userExampprRegist 설 명 : 사용자시험지등록 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_EXAMPPR ( EXAMPPR_ID , TKEXAM_ID , QSTN_ID , USER_ID , QSTN_DSPLY_SEQNO , QSTN_VWITM_DSPLY_SEQ , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM ) SELECT 'EXPPR' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDDHH24MISS') || LPAD(MOD(EXTRACT(SECOND FROM SYSTIMESTAMP) * 1000, 1000), 3, '0') || LOWER(SUBSTR(RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID()), 1, 7)) || LPAD(ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY NULL), 3, '0') AS EXAMPPR_ID , A.TKEXAM_ID , A.QSTN_ID , #{userId} AS USER_ID , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CASE WHEN A.QSTN_RNDMYN = 'N' THEN A.QSTN_SEQNO ELSE DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE END) AS QSTN_DSPLY_SEQNO , (SELECT LISTAGG(QSTN_VWITM_SEQNO,'@#') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CASE WHEN A.QSTN_VWITM_RNDMYN = 'N' THEN QSTN_VWITM_SEQNO ELSE DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE END) FROM TB_LMS_QSTN_VWITM WHERE QSTN_ID = A.QSTN_ID GROUP BY QSTN_ID) AS QSTN_VWITM_DSPLY_SEQ , #{rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID , FN_DTTM() FROM ( SELECT TKEXAM.TKEXAM_ID , QSTN.QSTN_ID , QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO , QSTN.QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO , EXAM_BSC.QSTN_RNDMYN , EXAM_BSC.QSTN_VWITM_RNDMYN , EXAM_BSC.QSTN_CNDDT_USEYN , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO ORDER BY CASE WHEN EXAM_BSC.QSTN_CNDDT_USEYN = 'N' THEN QSTN.QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO ELSE DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE END) AS RNUM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL ON EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_QSTN QSTN ON QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID = EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM ON EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID AND TKEXAM.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} AND EXAM_DTL.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_DTL.USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_BSC.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_BSC.USEYN = 'Y' AND QSTN.DELYN = 'N' ) A WHERE A.RNUM = 1
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExampprDAO.exampprBulkExcelDownQuizQstnList 설 명 : 시험지일괄엑셀다운퀴즈문항목록 */ SELECT TKEXAM.USER_ID , DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(QSTN.QSTN_CTS, 4000, 1) AS QSTN_CTS , QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD' AND CD = QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD) AS QSTN_RSPNS_TYNM , QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO , QSTN.QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO , ANSW_SHT.ANSW_SHT_CTS , ANSW_SHT.SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL ON EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID AND EXAM_DTL.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_DTL.USEYN = 'Y' JOIN TB_LMS_QSTN QSTN ON EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID AND QSTN.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM ON EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID AND TKEXAM.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAMPPR EXAMPPR ON QSTN.QSTN_ID = EXAMPPR.QSTN_ID AND TKEXAM.TKEXAM_ID = EXAMPPR.TKEXAM_ID AND TKEXAM.USER_ID = EXAMPPR.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_ANSW_SHT ANSW_SHT ON EXAMPPR.EXAMPPR_ID = ANSW_SHT.EXAMPPR_ID AND QSTN.QSTN_ID = ANSW_SHT.QSTN_ID AND EXAMPPR.USER_ID = ANSW_SHT.USER_ID WHERE EXAM_BSC.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_BSC.USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} ORDER BY QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID, QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO, QSTN.QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO
